title: Firmus (disambiguation)
content:
'''Firmus''' was a first name used by [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|males]]. People with this name included:

==Canon==
*'''[[Firmus Piett]]''', [[Captain]] and later [[Admiral]] serving [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader]] aboard the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']].
*'''[[Firmus Rennet]]''', member of the [[Grav-ball]] team [[AppSci SaberCats]] at [[Lothal]]'s [[Junior Academy of Applied Sciences]].

==Legends==
*'''[[Firmus Kett]]''', captain in the [[Trade Defense Force]]and great-great-great-grandson of [[Findal Kett]].
*'''[[Firmus Nantz]]''', admiral and commander of the [[New Republic First Fleet]].
*'''[[Firmus Piett/Legends|Firmus Piett]]''', [[Captain/Legends|captain]] and later [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] serving [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] aboard the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']].

{{Disambig}}
